title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Join the HDFC Bank Global Group family as a Financial Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
